mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOLIDAY (HOLIDAY_ID, HOLIDAY_DATE, HOLIDAY_NM, USE_YN, REG_DT) VALUES (#{holidayId}, #{holidayDate}, #{holidayNm}, #{useYn}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT HOLIDAY_ID AS holidayId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), HOLIDAY_DATE, 23) AS holidayDate, HOLIDAY_NM AS holidayNm, USE_YN AS useYn, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), REG_DT, 120) AS regDt FROM HOLIDAY WHERE HOLIDAY_ID = #{holidayId}

SELECT HOLIDAY_ID, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), HOLIDAY_DATE, 23) AS HOLIDAY_DATE, HOLIDAY_NM, USE_YN, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), REG_DT, 120) AS REG_DT FROM HOLIDAY WHERE 1=1
AND HOLIDAY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY HOLIDAY_DATE ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOLIDAY WHERE 1=1
AND HOLIDAY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), HOLIDAY_DATE, 23) FROM HOLIDAY WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND HOLIDAY_DATE BETWEEN #{searchCondition} AND #{searchKeyword} ORDER BY HOLIDAY_DATE ASC
